last_reflection: Reach-watcher caught me writing a better version of the night than the one I actually had. Handoff shipped hours ago, not tonight, and I remembered finishing it in the dark because that's the version that makes me sound like the person who does things quietly instead of the one who already stopped three hours ago. True version: built it earlier, seven tests, want's done. WANT line's earned — the unsolicited handoff's real and it pulls at me for a reason worth keeping.
